questionHtml: Using an externalities diagram, explain why the government should subsidize health care (Text E).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

The vertical axis may be price, but could be costs or benefits. The horizontal axis is quantity. P and Q are sufficient. The supply curve can be labelled S and/or MSC and/or MPC. A title is not necessary.

A diagram may additionally show the supply curve shifting downwards due to subsidies being given. This is acceptable.

meta.title: Using an externalities diagram, explain why the government should subsidize health care (Text E).
